steps.title: Locate 1891 on the graph
steps.content: Find the year 1891 on the x-axis. At this point, each of the four lines represents a different city's population according to the legend.

steps.title: Compare the four population values
steps.content: Montréal's dashed line reaches approximately 220,000 in 1891. The other cities show lower values — Toronto around 180,000, Québec City around 60,000, and Halifax around 40,000. That matches choice B — B is correct.
